app.title: Chemistry Simulation Platform
reaction.experimentalDisclaimer: This result was produced by a heuristic engine (valence + electronegativity estimate), not the curated rule DB. It may not match real-world outcomes.
reaction.noMatchingRule: No rule matches the given reactants and conditions.
reaction.conditionOutOfRange: Conditions fall outside the applicable rule ranges.
reaction.abstained: The heuristic engine could not produce a result.
reaction.rdkitNotReady: The chemistry engine is still loading.
reaction.embedFailed: Failed to generate 3D coordinates for the products.
reaction.ruleEngineDeferred: Rule-based prediction is currently disabled (heuristic only).
app.webgl2Unsupported.title: WebGL2 not supported
app.webgl2Unsupported.reason: Your browser or device does not support WebGL2, required for the 3D molecular viewport.
app.webgl2Unsupported.suggestion: Update your browser to the latest version, or enable hardware acceleration / WebGL2 in browser settings.
app.panelError.title: The {{slot}} panel encountered an error
